## Datos

The out-of-sample Sharpe is {sharpe_oos:.2f}, the out-of-sample win rate is {win_rate_oos:.2%}, the out-of-sample max drawdown is {max_drawdown_oos:.2%}, and OOS degradation is {oos_degradation:.2%}. Gate summary: {gates_summary}. First failed gate: {first_failed}.

## Interpretacion

The evidence does not satisfy the fixed quality gates for this demo. The failed gate is a validation result, not an execution error.

## Recomendacion

Close the hypothesis by gate outcome and do not continue to any trading workflow.
